ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'Feature Update')), RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa', RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Partnership", ISCHANGED(Probability), Probability >= 0.25, OR( ISBLANK(Champion__c), isblank(Champion_Title__c) ), RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Rank_Ranger", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "New Sale/Upsell", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Acquired_Company", NOT(CONTAINS($Profile.Name, 'Integration')), $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', MEDPIC_Next_Stage__c = false )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate a Champion with a Title
